<!--
PR title must follow Conventional Commits (validated by the Semantic PR workflow),
e.g. "fix(editor): ...", "feat(i18n): ...", "build(deps): ...".
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (lint + rollup + babel)
- [ ] `dist/` is rebuilt and committed
- [ ] Tested in a real Home Assistant instance
- [ ] Translations updated in `src/translations/{en,fr}.json` if UI strings changed
